arts.ttl: Liverpool handed boost in their pursuit of 24-year-old Tottenham and Newcastle target
arts.sum: Liverpool are keen on signing Antoine Semenyo from Bournemouth. According to Football Insider, the 24-year-old has attracted interest from Tottenham and Newcastle as well. Liverpool are prepared to rival both clubs for his signature. Liverpool are hoping to add more depth to their attacking unit and the versatile Bournemouth forward would be ideal for them. arts.ttl: Man City starlet scores from kick-off in stunning hat-trick including inventive finish in huge win
arts.sum: Manchester City continued their good form in the Under-18 Premier League with a resounding win over Newcastle - featuring a brilliant hat-trick from Divine Mukasa.

arts.ttl: 'He's gone' – Liverpool told Mohamed Salah has made mind up after contract outburst
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has stirred the pot by publicly revealing that Liverpool are yet to offer him a new contract and the Egyptian will be free to speak to foreign clubs in January

arts.ttl: Steven Gerrard addresses Al-Ettifaq sacking as Liverpool icon makes statement after defeat
arts.sum: Steven Gerrard spoke after watching his Al-Ettifaq side lose 4-0 to Al-Ittihad on Saturday in yet another damaging defeat for the Liverpool legend in the Saudi Pro League

arts.ttl: Man City 'in four-way fight' to sign history-making 18-year-old La Liga defender
arts.sum: Manchester City are one of four Premier League clubs keeping an eye on the performances of Juma Bah, an 18-year-old centre-back currently on loan at Real Valladolid.
